themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּקְרְב֧וּ: came near - to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose".
